caption: James Gillray, High Change in Bond Street; ou la politesse du grande monde [graphic]. Etching on wove paper, hand-colored. PUBLISHED BY H. HUMPHREY, LONDON, 1796
description: A satirical etching by James Gillray depicting a crowded scene of fashionable people on Bond Street, London. A woman in a polka-dot dress with a very tall feather in her hat is seen from behind in the center, surrounded by men in top hats and other elegantly dressed women.

caption: James Gillray, High Change in Bond Street; ou la politesse du grande monde [graphic]. Etching on wove paper, hand-colored. PUBLISHED BY H. HUMPHREY, LONDON, 1796
description: A hand-colored etching by James Gillray depicting a crowded street scene in London, with people dressed in elaborate, fashionable attire, including large hats and feathers.
